info.title: Workers AI Claude Desktop
info.description: Claude Desktop 3P gateway for Workers Ai Models

display_name.description: A human-readable name for the model.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 datetime string representing the time at which the model was released. May be set to an epoch value if the release date is unknown.

max_input_tokens.description: Maximum input context window size in tokens for this model.

max_tokens.description: Maximum value for the `max_tokens` parameter when using this model.

supported.description: Whether this capability is supported by the model.

schema.description: ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately after this object.

parameters.description: ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately after this object.
parameters.name: after_id

schema.description: ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately before this object.

parameters.description: ID of the object to use as a cursor for pagination. When provided, returns the page of results immediately before this object.
parameters.name: before_id

schema.description: Number of items to return per page.

parameters.description: Number of items to return per page.
parameters.name: limit

200.description: The Models API response can be used to determine which models are available for use in the API. More recently released models are listed first.

first_id.description: First ID in the `data` list. Can be used as the `before_id` for the previous page.

has_more.description: Indicates if there are more results in the requested page direction.

last_id.description: Last ID in the `data` list. Can be used as the `after_id` for the next page.
